summary: RAPID public-release candidate for Youtoola Utility #1 with released registry state, public discovery, factual SEO and consent-gated allowlisted utility analytics.

evidence.reference: Automated and manual Preview accessibility evidence is required before REVIEW approval.
Allowlisted utility-event and canonical analytics-context tests pass locally.
Focused tests reject raw inputs, exact results, free text and unsupported fields.
Calculation boundary tests cover zero values, negative values and passenger integer requirements.
Registry and utility definition record calculation version 1.
Complete diff inspection and git diff --check remain required before BUILD completion.
Utility events use the existing Production-only consent provider and do not buffer or replay.
Owner RAPID REVIEW of factual public copy remains pending.
Sitemap, canonical host and Preview noindex tests pass locally.
Local and Preview provider-transmission checks remain required before REVIEW approval.
Public selectors expose only the released calculator and no fixture or future slot.
Invalid numeric and whole-number inputs are rejected deterministically.
Methodology version 1 preserves the owner-approved formula and display-only rounding boundary.
GitHub Quality, End-to-end and Vercel checks are pending.
START RAPID PUBLIC RELEASE
Authenticated noindexed Vercel Preview verification is pending.
The event allowlist excludes input values, results, identity, free text and URL state; owner REVIEW remains pending.
Verify route, metadata, sitemap, analytics consent boundaries and rollback target after separate SHIP approval.
Utility tracking calls only the existing provider-neutral consent boundary; no provider or dependency is added.
Pure calculation vectors retain raw precision and preserve toll and return-trip semantics.
Registry validation passes with Fuel Trip Calculator as the sole released utility.
BUILD report will record factual branch, commit, Preview, Production and blocker status.
Related-tool selectors remain empty and future journeys remain unpublished.
Required viewport and 200-percent text Preview review is pending.
Standard risk is the lowest accurate classification for a user-supplied, non-authoritative trip-cost estimate.
If live verification fails, restore Ready Production deployment dpl_4qD7VRwjfrUetcajCzQiBdFVavSv and remove the released route through the normal rollback workflow.
Calculation tests retain raw precision and round only formatted presentation values.
Negative analytics tests reject raw values, exact results and unsupported payload keys.
Unique metadata, canonical, Open Graph, Twitter and breadcrumb tests pass locally.
The sitemap includes exactly the canonical calculator URL in addition to the existing five URLs.
Registry source coordinates and approved content hash are unchanged; the Sheet is provenance, not calculation authority.
The calculator uses no cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, URL state, event buffer or replay.
BreadcrumbList is the only truthful approved structured-data contract used; unsupported utility schema is omitted.
Focused unit and component suite passes locally.

rollbackPlan.method: Restore Ready Production deployment dpl_4qD7VRwjfrUetcajCzQiBdFVavSv and revert the public release if live route, indexing, consent or calculation verification fails.

evidence: Focused public route, registry, discovery, SEO, sitemap and analytics implementation
